link.description: A host-owned public link. AppViews may choose icons and labels from the role, while preserving unknown roles as plain outbound links.

label.description: Optional human label. Recommended when role is linkRoleOther.

image.description: A visual asset for a host profile or host service listing.

purpose.description: How this image is intended to be used. Other string values may be valid.

image.description: Image blob. Use square images for avatar/logo purposes and wide images for banner/hero/social-card purposes.

alt.description: Accessible alt text for the image.

aspectRatio.description: width:height represents an image aspect ratio. It may be approximate.

serviceRef.description: A reference from an operator profile to one of its account.atmosphere.host.service records.

uri.description: AT URI of an account.atmosphere.host.service record.

host.description: Optional normalized public host address for easier display before the referenced service record is hydrated.

signup.description: Public signup posture for a host. This is self-declared by the host operator and can be overridden or annotated by local AppView moderation.

url.description: Where a person can create or request an account.

capability.description: A public account-control or portability capability exposed by the host. Dangerous actions remain host-authoritative; Atmosphere should link or embed host-owned flows.

url.description: Optional host-owned page or API documentation for this capability.

contact.description: Public operator contact metadata. Avoid putting private contact details in public records.

handle.description: Optional public AT Protocol handle for support or operator contact.

software.description: Optional public implementation metadata for the host's PDS or hosting stack.

operatorIndividual.description: The host is operated by an individual.

operatorCommunity.description: The host is operated by a community or informal group.

operatorCooperative.description: The host is operated by a cooperative.

operatorCompany.description: The host is operated by a company.

operatorPublicBenefit.description: The host is operated by a public-benefit organization.

operatorNonprofit.description: The host is operated by a nonprofit.

operatorGovernment.description: The host is operated by a government or public institution.

operatorUnknown.description: The host operator type is not declared.

purposeAvatar.description: A square avatar used on host cards and account-host identity surfaces.

purposeLogo.description: A logo or wordmark for the host.

purposeBanner.description: A wide banner image for a host profile or listing page.

purposeHero.description: A large promotional or feature image for a rich host page.

purposeSocialCard.description: An image sized and formatted for social sharing previews.

linkRoleSignup.description: A page where people can create or request an account.

linkRoleLogin.description: A page where existing users can sign in.

linkRoleSupport.description: A support, help, or contact page.

linkRoleTerms.description: Terms of service or acceptable-use policy.

signupWaitlist.description: Signup is available through a waitlist.

signupClosed.description: The host is not currently accepting new accounts.

statusPreview.description: The host service is in preview, beta, or early access.

statusDeprecated.description: The host service is deprecated or being phased out.

statusOffline.description: The host service is offline or unavailable.

statusUnknown.description: The host service status is not declared.

capabilityDashboard.description: The host exposes a standard account dashboard.

capabilityOAuthGrantManagement.description: The host lets users view or manage OAuth grants and connected apps.

capabilityActiveSessions.description: The host lets users view or manage active sessions and devices.

capabilityAppPasswords.description: The host lets users manage app passwords or equivalent delegated credentials.

capabilityPasswordManagement.description: The host lets users manage password or primary authentication settings.

capabilityRotationKeys.description: The host exposes rotation-key education, status, or management.

capabilityBackups.description: The host offers backup status or backup management.

capabilityRestore.description: The host offers account restore tooling.

capabilityMigration.description: The host offers account migration tooling.

capabilitySupport.description: The host exposes user support workflows.

capabilityAccountDeletion.description: The host lets users request or manage account deletion.

capabilitySupported.description: The capability is supported directly by the host.

capabilityExternal.description: The capability is available through a linked external host-owned flow.

capabilityPlanned.description: The capability is planned but not currently available.
